_note: collides 는 요청 레이아웃 기준 후보 플래그. 실물 확인 후 core-coder 와 조율.

generation.prompt: Painterly cel-shaded 2D top-down fantasy RPG art, faded pastel palette, soft rim light and gentle cel-shading, atmospheric fog with aerial perspective, melancholic lonely wistful-wonder mood. Slightly-tilted bird's-eye top-down view for a tile-based game. Muted, low-saturation colors only, no bright primary colors, no glossy or neon highlights. Original dark-fantasy world, not based on any existing franchise. Seamless 48px grid tiles, top-down projection, matte painterly texture, muted palette. Chapter mood: the Mistmere magic academy interior, candlelight faded-gold warmth against cold forbidden-section shadow, dark muted sage-green and shadow-plum, the duality of light and shade. Top-down RPG terrain tileset in a strict 4x4 grid of 16 seamless square tiles, filled edge-to-edge, tileable seamless edges, read left-to-right top-to-bottom in this exact order. Row 1: polished grey stone floor, darker stone floor variant, muted ornate carpet rug, pale marble floor tile. Row 2: aged wood plank floor, interior cobblestone, solid stone wall block, stone pillar column. Row 3: tall wooden bookshelf full of books, short bookshelf, wooden study desk, empty wooden chair. Row 4: iron candle stand with faint gold flame, dim stained-glass window wall low saturation, patterned rug edge, faded arcane circle drawn on floor. Consistent soft interior lighting across all tiles, no labels, no numbers, no grid lines, no text.

_seamless_regen.reason: art-director tiling review — base terrain tiles regenerated seamless (center-glow removed, flat low-contrast lighting, edge-wrap blended)
_seamless_regen.note: 그리드/index/collision/dims 불변, 해당 셀 픽셀만 교체
